word: H5071 - נְדָבָה - nᵉdâbâh - ned-aw-baw' - Free offering

sections.paragraph:
Original: נדבה

Transliteration: nedâbâh

Phonetic: ned-aw-baw'

BDB Definition:

  1. voluntariness, free-will offering
    1. voluntariness
    2. freewill, voluntary, offering

Origin: from H5068

TWOT entry: 1299a

Part(s) of speech: Noun Feminine
